popularStory.headline:
Mary Atwater Honywood
(1527 – 11 May 1620)
popularStory.description:
She was married in February 1543, at the age of sixteen, to Robert Honywood of Postling in Kent.

She had sixteen children. Two died young. An account of the remaining fourteen is given in "Morant's H …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Atwater於大約1527年出生在英國肯特倫哈姆時，她的父親Robert Atwater28歲，母親Catherine Bright49歲。她於1543年2月與Sir Robert Honywood Esq在英國肯特肯特結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和16個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年5月16日在英國艾可享年94歲，埋葬在英國肯特倫哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Atwater于大约1527年出生在英国肯特倫哈姆时，她的父亲Robert Atwater28岁，母亲Catherine Bright49岁。她于1543年2月与Sir Robert Honywood Esq在英国肯特肯特结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和16个女儿的父母。她去世于1620年5月16日在英国艾可享年94岁，埋葬在英国肯特倫哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Atwater
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone whose dwelling was by a river or lake, Middle English atte water ‘at the water’.
History: This surname was established from an early date in New England. David Atwater was one of the group of settlers who founded the New Haven colony in 1638.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Atwater was born about 1527, in Lenham, Kent, England, her father, Robert Atwater, was 28 and her mother, Catherine Bright, was 49. She married Sir Robert Honywood Esq in February 1543, in Kent, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 16 daughters. She died on 16 May 1620, in Essex, England, at the age of 94, and was buried in Lenham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Atwater est née environ 1527, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert Atwater, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine Bright, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Honywood Esq en février 1543, à Kent, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 16 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 mai 1620, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Atwater um 1527 in Lenham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Atwater 28 und ihre Mutter Catherine Bright 49. Sie hat im Februar 1543 in Kent, Kent, England Sir Robert Honywood Esq geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 16 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Mai 1620 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Lenham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Atwater è nata il circa 1527 nel Lenham, Kent, England, sua padre, Robert Atwater, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Catherine Bright, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Honywood Esq nel febbraio 1543, nel Kent, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 16 figlie. Morì il 16 maggio 1620, nel Essex, England, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Lenham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Atwaterが約1527年にイギリスケントレンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Atwaterは28歳，母Catherine Brightは49歳であった。1543年2月にイギリスケントケントでSir Robert Honywood Esqと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と16人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年5月16日にイギリスエセックスで94歳で死去し，イギリスケントレンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Atwater(이)가 대략 1527년 영국 켄트 렌함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Atwater(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Bright(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1543년 2월 영국 켄트 켄트에서 Sir Robert Honywood Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 5월 16일 영국 에세스에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 렌함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Atwater nasceu aproximadamente 1527, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Atwater, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Bright, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Honywood Esq em fevereiro de 1543, em Kent, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 16 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de maio de 1620, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Atwater родилась около 1527 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Atwater было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Bright, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Honywood Esq февраль 1543 г. в местности кэнт, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 16 дочерей. Она умерла 16 мая 1620 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Atwater nació aproximadamente 1527, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Atwater, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catherine Bright, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Honywood Esq en febrero de 1543, en Kent, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 16 hijas. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1620, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra.
